original_image_tags: A vertical, beige/tan-colored manila document folder or envelope, viewed from the front. The folder has a top flap folded over, with two dark circular reinforcement rings around fastener holes. A piece of clear, aged tape is applied horizontally across the lower middle section, partially covering a faint, rectangular area where a label may have been. The tape is yellowed and has a wrinkled, opaque section in its center.

elements.description: Back of a brown paper enclosure envelope. Two hole-punch marks at the top. A piece of clear tape with adhesive residue in the center. Two printed labels reading 'ENCLOSURE'. Handwritten text at the bottom reading '62-83894' and '-123' in red ink.
